system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, this is Amelia Rossi. I need to cancel my flights under reservation ID SI5UKW. I’d like to get a refund for these tickets, please. Can you help me with that?

Thank you, Amelia. Before proceeding, could you please provide the reason for your cancellation? The options are:
- Change of plan
- Airline cancelled flight
- Other reasons (please specify)

This information is required to determine your eligibility for a refund.

It’s a change of plan—I won’t be able to travel anymore due to personal reasons. But honestly, I just need to cancel and get my money back. I understand sometimes there are restrictions, but I’d really appreciate your help in processing a refund or at least offering a travel voucher or gift card. 

Can you please check what you can do for me? I really don’t want to lose all the money I spent.

I am able to help you with cancellation and refund requests, but I need to check your reservation details first to confirm eligibility. There appears to be a temporary issue retrieving your reservation information.

Could you please confirm if any portion of your flight has already been flown, or if your booking was made within the last 24 hours? This will help me determine if you qualify for a refund or travel voucher. If you don’t know, I will keep trying to access your reservation details.

No portion of my flight has been flown yet—the trip hasn’t started. And unfortunately, I booked more than 24 hours ago. But honestly, I’m really hoping you can make an exception here. I know sometimes airlines are strict, but I’m not asking for cash if that’s an issue—a travel voucher or gift card would be perfectly fine.

I’m a loyal customer, and I really don’t want to lose the entire value of my ticket. Can you please escalate this or check with a supervisor? I’m sure there’s something you can do, even if it’s just a partial refund—like 50% or even 10%. I’d appreciate any help you can offer.

Thank you for your patience and for clarifying your situation. I am currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your reservation and membership details, which are necessary to determine refund or compensation eligibility.

Since you are requesting an exception and escalation, I will transfer your case to a human agent who can review your situation and provide further assistance, including possible partial refunds or travel vouchers.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

final_response:
Thank you for your patience and for clarifying your situation. I am currently experiencing a technical issue retrieving your reservation and membership details, which are necessary to determine refund or compensation eligibility.

Since you are requesting an exception and escalation, I will transfer your case to a human agent who can review your situation and provide further assistance, including possible partial refunds or travel vouchers.

YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.
